name: Carrie Underwood
title: Country Music Singer
bio: American singer and songwriter who rose to fame as the winner of Season 4 of American Idol. She has sold over 85 million records worldwide and won multiple Grammy Awards.
faith: Underwood has been open about her Christian faith throughout her career. She recorded the gospel album 'My Savior' and has said, 'For me, it just feels natural and organic. It's just who I am. It's part of who I am.'

sources.title: Carrie Underwood — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the country music star

sources.title: Find Your Path: Honor Your Body, Fuel Your Soul, and Get Strong with the Fit52 Life
sources.note: By Carrie Underwood (Dey Street Books, 2020). Discusses her faith as foundation for her life and wellness philosophy

sources.title: Carrie Underwood on Recording 'My Savior' Gospel Album
sources.note: Interview about recording traditional hymns and the role of faith in her life and career

tagline: Country music's biggest voice who credits everything to Jesus
